ddls:
CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the node */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the node */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the node */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of the node (e.g., physical, virtual) */,
  "node_status" TEXT /* Status of the node (e.g., online, offline) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node hosting the resource */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., Process, Docker) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "memory_max" REAL /* Maximum memory usage */,
  "memory_avg" REAL /* Average memory usage */,
  "cpu_max" REAL /* Maximum CPU utilization */,
  "cpu_avg" REAL /* Average CPU utilization */,
  "traffic_in" TEXT /* Incoming network traffic */,
  "traffic_out" TEXT /* Outgoing network traffic */,
  "disc_read" TEXT /* Disk read operations */,
  "disc_write" TEXT /* Disk write operations */,
  "resource_status" TEXT /* Status of the resource (e.g., running, stopped) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES resource_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource the label is assigned to */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label */,
  "label_value" TEXT /* Value of the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_labels_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource the configuration belongs to */,
  "config_key" TEXT /* Key of the configuration */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration */,
  "config_type" TEXT /* Type of the configuration (e.g., env, system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_configs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., memory_usage, cpu_utilization) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., gauge, counter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource the alert belongs to */,
  "alert_name" TEXT /* Name of the alert (e.g., high_memory_usage) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, devops, developer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the performance data */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource that the dependency belongs to */,
  "dependent_resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource that is dependent on the primary resource */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., host, container) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_dependencies_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_dependencies_dependent_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource the historical record belongs to */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., config_update, metric_recorded) */,
  "change_value" TEXT /* Value of the change */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_history_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource the threshold belongs to */,
  "threshold_name" TEXT /* Name of the threshold (e.g., high_memory_usage) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Value of the threshold */,
  "threshold_type" TEXT /* Type of the threshold (e.g., warning, critical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_thresholds_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource the prediction belongs to */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "predicted_usage" REAL /* Predicted resource usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_predictions_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)
